    <script>
      const search = location.search.substr(1);
      const params = {};
      search.split('&').forEach(function (kv) {
        const arr = kv.split('=');
        const k = arr[0];
        const v = arr[1];
        if (k && v) {
          params[k] = decodeURIComponent(v);
        }
      });
      (function (env, pageCodes) {
        const request = new XMLHttpRequest();
        const urlArr = ['//servicehall.cdn.taobao.com/widget/prefetch/', env, '/resource.json?', Date.now()];
        request.open('get', urlArr.join(''), true);
        request.onreadystatechange = function () {
          if (request.readyState === 4) {
            const response = request.responseText;
            if (request.status === 200) {
              const result = JSON.parse(response);
              const pageList = pageCodes.split(',');
              let resources = [];
              resources = resources.concat(result.payload.common || []);
              for (let i = 0; i < pageList.length; i++) {
                const pageCode = pageList[i];
                resources = resources.concat(result.payload[pageCode] || []);
              }
              for (let i = 0; i < resources.length; i++) {
                const link = document.createElement('link');
                link.href = resources[i];
                link.rel = 'prefetch';
                link.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
                document.head.appendChild(link);
              }
            }
          }
        };
        request.send();
      })(params.env || 'pre', params.pageCodes || 'home');
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
